overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player exits a graffiti-covered indoor corridor into a bustling downtown area with holographic billboards, walks along orange-textured sidewalks beneath elevated highways, explores a trash-filled side alley with resting NPCs, and returns to the main street with futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with red wall art and green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls and green neon fixtures toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: large wall covered in red abstract graffiti and mechanical art installations
green fluorescent tube lights framing doorways and ceiling edges
industrial metal doorway leading to the next corridor section
dark concrete walls with weathered textures and ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, enclosed indoor corridor illuminated by green neon lights. The walls feature prominent red graffiti art, and the camera moves steadily forward through the concrete passageway toward an exit. No other characters or vehicles are present in this confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exit plaza with velvet rope barriers and digital advertising

events.description: exits the narrow corridor into a covered outdoor plaza with city views and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: exiting the building through a wide doorway into a plaza area with concrete columns and red velvet ropes

notable_agents.action: standing near a concrete column looking out toward the street

entered.detail: large structural columns supporting the building overhang at the exit
barrier ropes on stanchions lining the exit pathway
large illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the building facade
purple and white automated vending machine against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player exits the building into a semi-covered plaza with concrete columns and red velvet rope barriers. A digital billboard and vending machine are visible on the right, while the open city street becomes visible ahead. The lighting shifts from artificial green neon to mixed natural dusk and city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway with dense neon signage

events.description: leaves the covered plaza and enters the open city street with visible traffic and towering buildings
futuristic vehicles drive past on the adjacent multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange-textured sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing holographic billboards and street lamps

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: distinctive orange diamond-patterned pavement tiles lining the pedestrian walkway
massive concrete overpass structure running above the street with support columns
tall circular building wrapped in horizontal neon light strips of various colors
large floating digital advertisements and brand displays hanging above the street
tall modern street light with dual lamps illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban street beneath an elevated highway. The camera walks along distinctive orange pavement tiles, passing beneath massive holographic billboards and alongside a cylindrical building wrapped in neon lights. Sparse pedestrian traffic and occasional futuristic vehicles populate the street as dusk settles over the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: secluded alley nook with trash accumulation and resting individuals

events.description: turns right off the main sidewalk into a fenced side area containing benches and trash piles
approaches a large accumulation of garbage bags and cardboard debris against the building wall

agents.ego_description: turning into a side alley area to explore the space, walking past concrete benches where people are sitting

notable_agents.action: sitting on a concrete bench looking at a handheld device
sitting on a bench wearing distinctive purple pants

entered.detail: black metal fence enclosing the side area with a gate entrance
large mound of blue garbage bags, cardboard, and scattered debris
orange-topped concrete seating built into planter boxes
large rectangular planters containing dense green shrubbery

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a secluded nook off the main street, enclosed by a metal fence and filled with trash piles. Two individuals sit on concrete benches with orange seats, one wearing purple pants. The area is dimly lit with green accent lighting and contains planter boxes with dense shrubs, creating a contrast between the natural elements and urban decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with moving traffic and large digital displays

events.description: exits the secluded trash-filled nook and returns to the main city street with traffic
multiple futuristic cars drive past on the multi-lane road alongside the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy downtown street, passing traffic barriers and large holographic advertisements

entered.detail: wide asphalt street with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic
futuristic cars and trucks driving along the road with headlights on
massive illuminated advertising screens mounted on buildings and overpasses
orange and white striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The player exits the side alley and returns to the bustling main street, where futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road. Large holographic billboards illuminate the scene from above, and traffic barriers line the orange sidewalk. The camera continues walking through the dense urban environment as the video concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit interior into the expansive, glowing heart of a futuristic city. It begins in a narrow concrete corridor illuminated by green neon and red graffiti, moving steadily forward toward a distant exit. As the camera emerges from the building, the environment shifts into a semi-covered plaza featuring red velvet rope barriers and digital vending machines, where the artificial green light gives way to the mixed tones of dusk. The scene then opens fully into a wide urban street beneath an elevated highway, gliding across distinctive orange pavement tiles. Finally, the view expands to reveal massive holographic billboards and a neon-wrapped cylindrical building as futuristic vehicles and pedestrians populate the darkening cityscape.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, decaying urban nook back into the vibrant chaos of a neon-lit main street. It begins by turning right into a dim side alley enclosed by a metal fence, where trash piles and green accent lighting surround two individuals resting on orange concrete benches. As the camera moves past dense shrubs in planter boxes, the claustrophobic atmosphere of the alleyway gives way to the open expanse of the city. The scene then shifts back to the bustling thoroughfare, where the dim lighting is replaced by the glow of massive holographic billboards and the movement of futuristic vehicles. Finally, the camera continues along the orange-textured sidewalk past traffic barriers, immersing itself once more in the dense urban environment.
